title: Happy-patty
content:
{{Top|ca|leg|notoc=1}}
The '''happy-patty''' was a type of [[Foodstuff/Legends|food]]<ref name="CSWE">{{CSWECite|II|17|Happy-patty}}</ref> available around the [[Standard year/Legends|year]] [[13 ABY/Legends|13 ABY]].<ref name="NEC">''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' places the events of ''[[Planet of Twilight]]'' in [[13 ABY/Legends|13 ABY]].</ref> A favorite among [[Youngling/Legends|children]], the dish could be prepared quickly.<ref name="CSWE" />

==Behind the scenes==
Happy-patties were first mentioned in ''[[Planet of Twilight]]'', a [[1997]] novel by [[Barbara Hambly]].<ref name="POT">''[[Planet of Twilight]]''</ref>

==Appearances==
*''[[Planet of Twilight]]'' {{1stm}}

==Sources==
*<!-- 2008-12-09 -->''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''
